title: BaseBody
description: Fields present on every event object in the Inspector v1 track request body.

apiKey.description: The Inspector API key passed to the constructor.

appName.description: Application name. Empty string if not provided.

libVersion.description: SDK library version. Plain SemVer string, no suffix.

libPlatform.description: SDK platform/language identifier (e.g. node, ruby, python, go).

anonymousId.description: Caller-supplied streamId, or empty string if none provided.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp with millisecond precision.

publicEncryptionKey.description: P-256 public key in hex (compressed 66 chars or uncompressed 130 chars). Present only when provided at constructor time.
